summary: Iteration 2 (frontend-only) E2E testing of reward system expansion: weapons, hero abilities, daily chest. All 18 test cases passed at 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: DailyChest useEffect timer cleanup is correct; uses 30s tick for countdown — acceptable.
Rewards.jsx buyWeapon: when forging a NEW weapon it auto-equips (currentWeapon = weapon.id). This is reasonable UX but means user cannot 'buy without equip' — confirm with PM if desired.
abilities.js applyMult uses Math.max(1, round(...)) so base=1 with 1.5× → 2 (verified). With base=1 and no perks → 1 (verified). Behaviour correct.

Iron sword roundBonus (+3 on level cleared) and enchanted_book (+5) NOT explicitly tested via 5-correct flow due to time, but logic in MathMine.useEffect on solved>=TARGET adds roundBonus(state) correctly per code review.
seed_data_creation: All state seeded via localStorage 'mc_learn_v1' key per scenario (diamonds, skins, weapons, currentSkin, currentWeapon, lastDailyClaim). Used time.time()*1000 as fresh lastDailyClaim to disable Daily Chest button when not under test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified flows: 1) Hub shows daily-chest-btn + 6 game tiles (math/fraction/letter/shape/memory/code) + tile-rewards. 2) Daily Chest opens modal, animates ~900ms, awards diamonds or weapon, sets lastDailyClaim, persists across reload, button shows 'Come back tomorrow' with countdown. 3) Rewards page tabs (rewards-tab-skins / -weapons / -badges) all switch content. 4) 6 heroes render with abilityDesc (diamond_hero has '1.5'). 5) 9 weapons render with weapon-action-<id> buttons. 6) Weapon purchase: wooden_sword cost 5 → diamonds 500→495, button changes to 'Unequip'; second click sets currentWeapon=null, button back to 'Equip'. 7) Hub equipped-weapon badge shows when currentWeapon set (verified Diamond Sword). 8) Math Mine perks: stone_pickaxe → perk-hint (1), click disables 1 wrong choice with line-through, hint button disappears. golden_pickaxe → perk-skip (1), click advances problem, button disappears. 9) Multipliers: diamond_sword 1.5× → 1 correct gives +2 diamonds. 10) Hero math_bonus (zombie) → +2 per correct math. 11) Hero diamond_x15 (diamond_hero) → +2 per correct. 12) Hero free_skip (enderman) → perk-skip (1) appears even with no weapon. 13) hud-reset-btn (auto-accepted confirm) clears weapons=[] and currentWeapon=null. No console errors. localStorage key still 'mc_learn_v1'.
